title: Luffy Faces the King
description: On pages 16–18, this part focuses on luffy faces the king, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Luffy Faces the King. Chopper’s grief meets Kureha’s harsh compassion as Hiriluk’s dream becomes a will that Chopper must carry forward. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What kinda afro-bro goes around throwing his afros at a lady?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Now you're showing a bit more class, kid.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: It won't come off! The hell's up with this afro!?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Is it because of static electric- ity!?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: And there's more where that came from.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Yo Reindeer! Don't just stand there! Help me get these things off!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: C'mon, hurry up! This feels nasty and its tacky as hell!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Ah, crap! It's stuck on me now!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Take at least one for yourself!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Yeah, it's freezing out there. Where'd my jacket go?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I meant if something was going on outside?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Oh... are you going to be alright?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Yeah, yeah, don't worry. Just go back to bed.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: I dunno... your jacket's not cool.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: "Well whatever. It'll do as long as it keeps me warm.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Alright, time to teach those pests a lesson!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Jeez... I thought something serious had happened.

summary: This part highlights luffy faces the king and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
